falsification_risks.name: GSEA p.adjust borderline
falsification_risks.text: turquoise mitochondrial terms p.adjust=0.043-0.047, just under 0.05 cutoff. Need permutation-based p-values.

falsification_risks.name: Signed network changes module structure
falsification_risks.text: 7 modules vs 5 unsigned. Turquoise persists but composition changed. Cannot confirm turquoise is identical between signed/unsigned without gene-level overlap analysis.

falsification_risks.name: ECM score is literature-derived
falsification_risks.text: ECM gene list from GO annotation, not experimentally validated. Score sensitivity to gene list choice untested.

survives: turquoise convergent signal (persists in signed network)
falsified: ORA on turquoise core (no improvement over whole-module ORA for BP/MF)
